title: Information Assurance Standard — Entity Information Quality Controls
description: New Zealand government standard establishing mandatory controls for ensuring entity information collected by relying parties is accurate, distinctive, and suitable for eligibility and capability decisions. Covers information risk assessment, data protection, verification integrity, and fraud prevention across four assurance levels.
